title: scrophularia alpestris
intro: Scrophularia alpestris, also known as alpine figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Scrophularia alpestris include its potential to help reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
